query:
SELECT 
  l.id,
  l.first_name,
  l.last_name,
  l.email AS lead_email,
  l.phone AS lead_phone,
  l.postal_code,
  l.city,
  l.custom_fields,
  l.created_at,
  l.status,
  l.follow_up_status,
  l.lead_type,
  p.id AS partner_id,
  p.company_name AS partner_name,
  p.contact_email AS partner_email,
  u.email AS partner_user_email,
  u.name AS partner_user_name
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN partners p ON l.assigned_partner_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON p.id = u.partner_id
WHERE l.lead_type = 'VENTE'
  AND l.assigned_partner_id IS NOT NULL
  AND l.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 WEEK)
ORDER BY p.company_name, l.created_at DESC;
